TextENGNew: ...In the end, I ended up going after school.
``...That took longer than I thought.``
For now, I decided to visit to the flowerbed in the yard before heading to the faculty room.
One section of the flowerbed was maintained by the gardening club, and the multicolored autumn flowers were in full bloom.
``...Huh? Nagisa?``
Just then, I ran into a classmate from the club who was doing some weeding.
She raised her head to look this way, and her eyes opened wide as soon as she saw me.
``Nagisa... I was so worried!@k@vS20/00/VTT_StuFa3003. Is it ok for you to be back so soon?``
``...Yeah, sorry.@k@vS20/35/VTT_nagisa3003. I was on duty this week, but I guess you ended up filling in for me.``
``Oh, I don't mind at all!@k@vS20/00/VTT_StuFa3005. Forget about me, what about you...?``
The girl grabbed me by the arms and looked up at me with moist, cloudy eyes.
A face that could burst into tears at any moment. ...She was seriously worried about me.
...She had been caring for me every day since the incident, and trying to encourage me.
Until a little while ago, I thought she was a thoughtless and aloof girl, so I was surprised to see so much compassion out of her... And I was glad to see it.
I didn't have any friends I could consider close friends since transferring here, but she was the only person I told about the incident with Kouhei-kun...

``...Sorry for making you worry.@k@vS20/35/VTT_nagisa3005. I... can't say I'm feeling perfectly fine, but I am feeling a little better.@k@vS20/35/VTT_nagisa3006. I think I'll start going to school properly, starting tomorrow.``
``...Thank goodness.``
The girl rubbed her muddy face to fight back the sobbing as tears came trickling out. When I saw that, I couldn't help but burst into tears too...
``...Well, it seems like you'll be able to get through this.@k@vS20/00/VTT_StuFa3008. Sawamura-kun...``

``Yeah. ...I met a really nice detective who is doing everything she can to help.@k@vS20/35/VTT_nagisa3008. I was talking to her on the phone earlier about all kinds of things, and it got really late.``
That detective named Minai wasn't just getting information out of me.
She was carefully choosing her words to make sure I didn't get hurt, and her attitude felt sincere.
Of course, there were still parts of the investigation she couldn't tell me about. Nevertheless, she always apologized in those cases and explained why she couldn't talk about it.
And in the middle of the conversation, she'd always say things like, ``Please cheer up,`` and ``I'll definitely keep my promise.`` I appreciated the encouragement.
``She seems like a really busy person, but she never made me feel that way.@k@vS20/35/VTT_nagisa3010. She always seemed cool and gallant, and I admire her...``
``So she was a career woman?@k@vS20/00/VTT_StuFa3010. A female detective, that's impressive.``
That's right.
The people who embrace earnest aspirations like that allow us to ask adults for help, no matter how desperate the situation is.
And we do our best to become those sorts of adults.
That's why I want to become an even more amazing adult...
Maybe that person can...
Maybe she'll believe me if I confess what Kouhei-kun told me on that day.
No... I'm certain she'll believe me and help out.
I'm still a little worried, but next time we meet I'll be bold enough to talk about it...
``...Oh, right.@k@vS20/35/VTT_nagisa3012. This cosmos flower is just about to bloom, isn't it?@k@vS20/35/VTT_nagisa3013. Would it be all right if I took one?``
``Yeah, that's fine... but what are you going to do with it?``
``I'd like to give it to that detective once it properly blooms.@k@vS20/35/VTT_nagisa3015. I hope that'll make her happy...``
This Thursday, Minai-san will be doing office work in the police station... When I called earlier, that's what the detective that answered told me.
The detective said she might be too busy to see me if I go in to visit her... but I'm certain Minai-san will make time for me.
Come to think of it, what was that detective's name...?
